mapper.select:
SELECT sd.stock_code, sm.lease_return_date AS lease_return_date, sm.name AS product_name, stm.name AS category_name,
CASE WHEN sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL AND sd.return_date IS NULL THEN '貸出中' ELSE '在庫' END AS status_name,
sd.limit_date AS return_date, stf.name AS staff_name
FROM stock_data sd
INNER JOIN stock_master sm ON sd.stock_code = sm.stock_code
INNER JOIN stock_type_master stm ON sm.stock_type = stm.stock_type
LEFT JOIN staff_data stf ON sd.staff_no = stf.staff_no
WHERE sm.ownership_type = 2
AND sm.stock_type = #{categoryId}
AND sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL AND sd.return_date IS NULL
AND sd.staff_no IS NULL
ORDER BY sm.lease_return_date ASC

SELECT stf.mail, stf.name AS staff_name, sm.name AS product_name, sm.lease_return_date
FROM stock_data sd
INNER JOIN stock_master sm ON sd.stock_code = sm.stock_code
LEFT JOIN staff_data stf ON sd.staff_no = stf.staff_no
WHERE sm.ownership_type = 2
AND DATE(sm.lease_return_date) = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

SELECT stf.mail, stf.name AS staff_name, sm.name AS product_name, sm.lease_return_date
FROM stock_data sd
INNER JOIN stock_master sm ON sd.stock_code = sm.stock_code
LEFT JOIN staff_data stf ON sd.staff_no = stf.staff_no
WHERE sm.ownership_type = 2
AND DATE(sm.lease_return_date) = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT stf.mail, stf.name AS staff_name, sm.name AS product_name, sm.lease_return_date
FROM stock_data sd
INNER JOIN stock_master sm ON sd.stock_code = sm.stock_code
LEFT JOIN staff_data stf ON sd.staff_no = stf.staff_no
WHERE sm.ownership_type = 2
AND DATE(sm.lease_return_date) = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT sd.stock_code, sm.name AS product_name, stm.name AS category_name, sd.limit_date AS return_date, sm.lease_return_date AS lease_return_date, stf.name AS staff_name,
CASE WHEN sm.ownership_type != 2 AND sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL AND sd.return_date IS NULL AND sd.limit_date < CURDATE() THEN '返却期限切れ'
WHEN sm.ownership_type != 2 AND sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL AND sd.return_date IS NULL AND sd.limit_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN '返却期限間近'
WHEN sm.ownership_type = 2 AND sm.lease_return_date < CURDATE() THEN 'リース返却期限切れ'
WHEN sm.ownership_type = 2 AND sm.lease_return_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 'リース返却期限間近' END AS alert_type,
DATEDIFF(sd.limit_date, CURDATE()) AS remaining_days, DATEDIFF(sm.lease_return_date, CURDATE()) AS remaining_lease_days
FROM stock_data sd
INNER JOIN stock_master sm ON sd.stock_code = sm.stock_code
INNER JOIN stock_type_master stm ON sm.stock_type = stm.stock_type
LEFT JOIN staff_data stf ON sd.staff_no = stf.staff_no
WHERE ( sm.ownership_type = 2 AND sm.lease_return_date IS NOT NULL AND sm.lease_return_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ) OR ( sm.ownership_type != 2 AND sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL AND sd.return_date IS NULL AND sd.limit_date IS NOT NULL AND sd.limit_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND sd.staff_no = #{_parameter}
)
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sm.ownership_type != 2 AND sd.limit_date < CURDATE() THEN 1
WHEN sm.ownership_type != 2 AND sd.limit_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 2
WHEN sm.ownership_type = 2 AND sm.lease_return_date < CURDATE() THEN 3
WHEN sm.ownership_type = 2 AND sm.lease_return_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 4
ELSE 5 END, sd.limit_date ASC, sm.lease_return_date ASC

SELECT sd.stock_code, sm.name AS product_name, stm.name AS category_name, sd.limit_date AS return_date, stf.name AS staff_name,
CASE WHEN sd.limit_date < CURDATE() THEN '返却期限切れ'
WHEN sd.limit_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN '返却期限間近' END AS alert_type,
DATEDIFF(sd.limit_date, CURDATE()) AS remaining_days
FROM stock_data sd
INNER JOIN stock_master sm ON sd.stock_code = sm.stock_code
INNER JOIN stock_type_master stm ON sm.stock_type = stm.stock_type
LEFT JOIN staff_data stf ON sd.staff_no = stf.staff_no
WHERE sm.ownership_type != 2 AND sd.staff_no = #{_parameter} AND sd.return_date IS NULL AND sd.limit_date IS NOT NULL AND sd.limit_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
ORDER BY sd.limit_date ASC
